import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)

  let a = match string.parse_int(match parts.get(0) when Some(x) x when None "" end)
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    return Err("bad input")
  end

  let b = match string.parse_int(match parts.get(1) when Some(x) x when None "" end)
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    return Err("bad input")
  end

  let s = match string.parse_int(match parts.get(2) when Some(x) x when None "" end)
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    return Err("bad input")
  end

  mut result = ""
  mut cur = a
  mut first = true

  while cur < b
    if first
      result = "#{cur}"
      first = false
    else
      result = "#{result} #{cur}"
    end
    cur = cur + s
  end

  println(result)
  Ok(())
end
